meta.title: Free Online Speech to Text Converter
meta.description: Votxt turns audio, video, and YouTube links into editable transcripts, summaries, mind maps, Q&A, translations, and subtitle exports.

app.tagline: Audio and video into text you can actually use.
app.empty: Start with a file or link. Your transcript and AI workspace will appear here.
app.headline: Convert Audio & Video to Text
app.subheadline: Upload media or paste a YouTube link. Votxt produces editable transcripts, speaker-aware segments, AI summaries, mind maps, Q&A, translations, and export files.
app.localUploadHint: Audio: aac, flac, m4a, mp3, opus, wav, webm. Video: mkv, mov, mp4, webm, wmv.
app.terms: By using Votxt, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
app.workflowUploadText: Drop a local file or paste a YouTube link. Large media goes through R2 and the queue.
app.workflowTranscribeText: Provider fallback chooses Groq, Deepgram, or AssemblyAI based on speed and speaker labels.
app.workflowExportText: Download transcript, subtitles, structured JSON, or PDF when the job is complete.
app.summaryEmpty: Generate insights after a transcript is ready.
app.mindMapEmpty: Mind map nodes will appear here.
app.qaEmpty: Key questions and answers will appear here.
app.recordHint: Recording creates a WebM audio file in the browser, then uses the same upload and transcription queue.
app.noTranscript: Live progress and transcript output will appear here after a task is created.
